title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: LangChain’s Ollama integration lets you call any model served by `ollama run` through the standard LangChain LLM interface.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models via Pythonic async/sync APIs.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers (via CORS).

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (like ChatGPT-ui) with multi-model conversations, markdown, code highlighting.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Rust: browse, pull, chat, manage models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot backend adapter that proxies to a local Ollama instance for private coding assistance.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and persistent storage.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain to chat with your documents offline.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and reactive streaming support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for building local LLM pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community cookbook with 30+ recipes: function calling, vision, voice, Docker Compose stacks, fine-tuning tips.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Unofficial Nim wrapper for Ollama’s REST API with async HTTP and native JSON handling.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model using slash commands.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds “Ask Ollama” command to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, or rewrite text locally.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama functions to AI agents (Cursor, Claude Desktop) for tool use.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform provider to declaratively manage Ollama models and Modelfiles as infrastructure.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app with admin UI and REST endpoints for chatting with Ollama models inside Django projects.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Official Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama’s HTTP API.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Socket Mode to interact with Ollama models in channels or DMs.
